arts.ttl: Everton reality dawns after mood change at David Moyes press conference
arts.sum: There isn't much David Moyes hasn't dealt with in his long career in football - but Everton have a way of throwing up challenges

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve been really surprised’: Moyes bemused by Everton’s PSR restrictions
arts.sum: Struggling club limited by PSR calculations this window Manager ‘really jealous’ of other clubs’ spending power David Moyes has expressed his surprise at the extent of the financial restrictions imposed on Everton and admitted jealousy over the spending power of rival Premier League clubs. Everton have money to spend this month after the The Friedkin Group’s takeover and were recently declared compliant with Premier League profitability and sustainability rules (PSR) up to the 2023-24 season. But the club remain limited by PSR calculations for this financial year and are unlikely to feel the full benefits of the takeover until the summer. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: David Moyes confirms Dwight McNeil surgery as he makes Michael Keane Everton striker admission
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes has been discussing player fitness and attacking options ahead of the game with Leicester City

arts.ttl: Moyes says Everton may use defender as auxiliary forward
arts.sum: David Moyes has said Everton ‘might need’ to use Michael Keane as an auxiliary forward if the club’s injury concerns continue. Dominic Calvert-Lewin joined fellow forwards Armando Broja and Youssef Chermiti on the sidelines last week, leaving Beto as the only recognised option in the Everton squad. arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Everton and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Fourteen Leicester City January transfer rumours and what happened next
arts.sum: Reports in Germany say City are keen on a January deal, and would be looking to steal a march on the likes of AC Milan and Juventus, who are eyeing him for a summer transfer. A title-winner in Argentina last year, big things are expected of Valentin Gomez, and he looked like being an ideal signing for City at the back.

arts.ttl: David Moyes starting to feel full impact of PSR as Everton search for January transfers
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes has been speaking about the potential of making new signings ahead of Monday's transfer deadline

arts.sum: The player made his Premier League debut against Manchester City and now wants to kick on

arts.ttl: Everton's Patson Daka transfer would need Leicester City solution as striker duo updates emerge
arts.sum: City have already sold one striker this month, letting Tom Cannon go to Sheffield United for £10m, while they had been hoping to move Odsonne Edouard on in order to free up another Premier League loan slot. Since Ruud van Nistelrooy took charge, Daka has been City’s back-up to Jamie Vardy, featuring in all but one of the Dutchman’s 11 matches in charge.

arts.ttl: Everton star continues trend after Dyche exit – Moyes effect clear, not feeling the pressure
arts.sum: Everton star Illiman Ndiaye has admitted David Moyes has taught them to ‘play in a team’ and changed a lot in the short time since his return. The forward has been speaking to Sene. News about life at Goodison Park to date, which inevitably meant a conversation about his new manager.
